The Woman Behind the Brand

Hi, I'm Roxanne.
I built this for myself first.

A few years ago, I was exhausted, overwhelmed, and completely burned out. My mind was scattered. My money felt chaotic. My home didn't feel like a sanctuary. I was doing so much — and none of it felt soft.

So I started building tools to help myself get clear. A journal. A budget tracker. Systems that actually worked with my life instead of against it. Slowly, everything shifted.

Soft Life Studio is what I wish had existed for me back then. Every single product here is something I created and used myself — designed to help you feel more intentional, more peaceful, and more like yourself.

Welcome to the soft life. You deserve it. 🌿

Got Questions?

Everything You Need to Know

What do I get when I buy? +
You get an instant digital download straight to your device. No waiting, no shipping. The moment you pay, your product is ready — use it on your phone, iPad, laptop, or print it at home.
Do I need special apps or software? +
No special apps needed. All products are PDF files that open on any device. The Canva templates open in the free version of Canva. Nothing extra to buy.
I've never bought a digital product. Is this easy? +
Very simple. Click the button, pay securely through Gumroad, and immediately receive a download link by email. If you ever have trouble, message us and we'll help you right away.
Can I print the journal and planners? +
Absolutely. All PDFs are designed to look beautiful printed at home or at a print shop. You can also use them digitally on your iPad with GoodNotes or Notability.
What is your refund policy? +
Because these are instant digital downloads, all sales are final. However, if you have any issue accessing your product, please contact us and we will make it right. Your satisfaction matters deeply to us.
Is the bundle really worth it? +
Absolutely. The bundle includes all 4 products covering your mindset, money, home, and vision — plus the Brain Dump worksheet. Click to view the bundle price and see exactly how much you save today.
